title: Porch Market Day
summary: A gentle reviewed creator pack focused on trading clues, meeting helpers, and testing reward flow.

scenes.title: Market Gate
scenes.text: A quiet bell marks the start of the porch market. A sign asks each visitor to bring one kind story.

scenes.title: Button Blanket
scenes.text: A blanket of buttons is sorted by memory. One blue button points toward a helper who needs a fair trade.

scenes.title: Tea Table Ledger
scenes.text: A tea table holds a small ledger. The ink only settles when a trade leaves both sides lighter.

npcs.title: Mara Penny
npcs.clue: Mara says the market opens when the bell, ledger, and blanket agree.

npcs.title: Tuck Thread
npcs.clue: Tuck knows which trade is fair, but only if the player asks with patience.

rewards.title: Fair Trade Token
rewards.text: Gain a token for a trade that helped both sides.
rewards.clue: The token points back to the market bell.
